step.title: Define domain scope
step.action: Collaborate with the user to define the domain scope and boundaries.
If product-brief or market-research exist, load them for context.

step.title: Research domain concepts and terminology
step.action: Identify core domain concepts, entities, and relationships.
Build a glossary of domain-specific terminology.

step.title: Identify standards and regulations
step.action: Research applicable industry standards (ISO, IEEE, W3C, etc.).
Identify regulatory requirements (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, etc.) relevant to the domain.

step.title: Document domain model
step.action: Create a conceptual domain model showing entities, relationships, and invariants.

step.title: Produce report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with research findings.
